# Rust Programming Language

Rust is a systems programming language developed by Mozilla Research. It was first released in 2015 and designed by Graydon Hoare. Rust focuses on safety, concurrency, and performance.

# Ownership Model

Rust uses an ownership model with borrowing and lifetimes to guarantee memory safety without a garbage collector. Each value in Rust has a single owner, and when the owner goes out of scope, the value is dropped.

# Cargo Package Manager

Cargo is the official package manager and build system for Rust. It manages dependencies, compiles packages, and distributes them via crates.io, the Rust community registry.
